hero.title: Cholados, ice cream & fresh fruit in San José
hero.subtitle: Homemade ice cream, strawberries & cream, obleas and more. Open every day noon to 10 pm.
hero.tagline: Un capricho refrescante a tu antojo

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A refreshing treat, just the way you crave it

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: From the streets of Cali to Tully Road
about.content: We're a Colombian family in San José. We missed the cholados from the street corners of Cali, so we started making them ourselves. We brought our family recipes and found the freshest fruit we could.
about.content2: Everything is made by hand: guanábana, lulo and passion fruit ice cream, obleas with arequipe, strawberries and cream. The name is a play on words: Rancho + cholados. This is our little ranch and here the cholado is king.
about.cta: We're on Tully Road, every day noon to 10.
about.value1Desc: Everything is made to order with our family recipes.
about.value3Desc: Guanábana, lulo, passion fruit, arequipe and more.

footer.tagline: A refreshing treat, just the way you crave it
